name: Demo — Residential Solar (Cold Outbound)
description: Cold outbound call to a homeowner about solar panel installation. Used to demo multi-company support.

beginner.statement: Wait, who is this and how did you get my number?
I'm not even sure I'll be in this house long enough to make it worth it.

intermediate.statement: Solar panels cost a fortune. I can't afford that.
I'm worried about them damaging my roof.
My yard has too many trees, I don't think I get enough sun.

advanced.statement: I'd have to talk to my spouse before deciding anything like this.
Honestly, every solar company that's called me has felt like a scam. How do I know you're different?
